text.title: Design Review PR Checklist — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the design-QA record shape. Designer reviewer or supporting agent must satisfy this contract before approving the PR.

forbidden.pattern: reviewer is an engineer with no design / design-engineering background
deltas_flagged_back is empty when implementation deviates from handoff (silent acceptance per r5)
checklist items extended beyond the 10 (style cleanup, test coverage, etc.) — out of scope per r4
review_duration_min < 5 with PR touching > 200 UI lines AND decision=approve (rubber-stamp)
handoff_package_link missing or stale (pointing to pre-PR handoff that no longer matches the implementation scope)

allowed-transformations.transformation: Mark items "n/a-with-reason" when truly inapplicable (e.g., dark_mode when product has no dark theme).
Reuse evidence from automated scripts (scan-pr-for-raw-values.py, axe-core output) instead of manual screenshots.
Batch a follow-up "handoff update" task into a single design-system PR when multiple PRs surface the same delta.

list.item: All 10 items have status pass / needs-changes / n/a-with-reason (r1)
Deviations from handoff are listed in deltas_flagged_back (r5)
Decision matches per-item status (no approve with open needs-changes) (f4)
